title: Ansan, GYE — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ansan, GYE: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ansan is a city in GYE with a population of 700,000. An industrial city on the west coast with a large multicultural community and the beautiful Sihwa Lake tidal flats.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
